notionSources.role: book, zine, art, typography, visual world

decisions.title: Notion remains canonical
decisions.detail: The Netlify book displays summaries and snapshots; it does not replace Notion as the operating system.

decisions.title: v0.8+ visual language
decisions.detail: Late-1980s adventure-game pixel interface with Loom / King's Quest-style dithering.

decisions.title: Self Love / Clark Gable leads rollout
decisions.detail: Lead release stays focused on September 2026 with current July/August prep.

decisions.title: Public/private boundary
decisions.detail: Decide which Notion-derived data can appear in the deployed interface.

decisions.title: Dashboard depth
decisions.detail: Decide how many charts/tables belong in the public portal versus the private Notion dashboard.
